summary: Excellent matrix recording captures the re‑emergent Help>Slip>Franklin's sequence on a fantastic Garden show.
review: The reviewer praises this historic Garden concert as a fantastic performance, highlighting the return of the Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin’s Tower suite. The first‑time matrix treatment is lauded for making the old venue sound clear and vibrant, delivering an excellent listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: A single highly positive 5‑star review emphasizes both a superb show and a successful matrix recording, leading to an exceptional rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First‑time matrix treatment praised for making the old Garden sound clear and up to the task; no noted flaws.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The reappearance of the Help>Slip>Franklin's sequence is highlighted as a key moment, suggesting strong set pacing.
